sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports right ankle pain and swelling following a fall, with limping and difficulty weight-bearing. He describes icing and ibuprofen use. He denies numbness. He reports playing soccer for many years and currently plays in a community league.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Physical exam reveals ecchymosis and swelling over the lateral malleolus, tenderness to palpation, and strong dorsalis pedis pulse. Capillary refill is less than three seconds. Neurological exam is intact. X-ray shows no fracture.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has a right ankle sprain.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Rescribe an aircast and crutches for the next one to two days. Advise continued icing and ibuprofen use as needed. Schedule a follow-up appointment in two weeks to assess progress and determine readiness to return to soccer.
